name: CommerceFlow Paystack
description: A full-stack e-commerce system using FastAPI and Paystack integration.

PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY.description: Your Paystack Secret Key from the dashboard (sk_test_... or sk_live_...).

PAYSTACK_PUBLIC_KEY.description: Your Paystack Public Key from the dashboard (pk_test_... or pk_live_...).

APP_URL.description: The base URL where the application is hosted.

DATABASE_URL.description: SQLAlchemy connection string. Defaults to local SQLite.
